cell_renormalization.reason: sum_(n>=1)g_n=Phi and the cell integrals partition the exactly vanishing continuous theta-index integral.

coupled_laguerre_matrix.boundary: The identity retains every mixed sign; no positivity of the matrix is proved.
coupled_laguerre_matrix.convergence: The double series is absolutely and locally uniformly convergent because the J_n jets are normally summable through order two.

euler_zeta_transform.scope: This is a convergent Euler cell-renormalization derived from the kernel; it uses no information about zeta zeros.

exact.live_handoff: Construct a t-compatible modular grouping whose individual blocks cancel the full negative-side theta tail before multiplication by exp(t*u^2), or work directly with the endpoint-subtracted theta primitive A_t and prove positivity of its coupled curvature expression.

normal_convergence.first_cell: For 0<a<=1, ||g_a||_(L1_k)<=C_k*a^(-1/2)*(1+|log a|^k), which is integrable at a=0.

positive_time_obstruction.consequence: For every fixed n>=1 and every t>0, exp(t*u^2)*r_n(u) is not integrable and has no ordinary half-line Fourier transform.
positive_time_obstruction.decision: The cell-renormalized decomposition is exact at t=0 but cannot be deformed blockwise to the positive Newman times required by the strict-correlation target.

uniform_transform.mode: The series and every fixed derivative order converge absolutely and uniformly on the real spectral axis.

proof_boundary: This artifact proves a pointwise and weighted-L1 convergent cell renormalization of the theta summands at t=0, an ordinary uniformly convergent transform series, Euler-zeta reconstruction, positive zero-frequency contributions, and an absolutely convergent coupled Laguerre matrix identity. It also proves that every individual block has a nonzero exp(-5u) tail and therefore cannot be deformed by the positive Newman Gaussian weight. It does not prove matrix positivity, the positive-time strict Laguerre theorem, Wiener density, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: The arithmetic theta summand extends to a continuous positive index with an exact translate law.
The complete continuous theta-index integral vanishes pointwise.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact Gaussian-moment cancellation; no discrete spectral sign follows.

rows.claim: Subtracting one continuous index cell from every arithmetic block leaves the full Xi kernel unchanged.

diagnostics.reason: sum_(n>=1)g_n=Phi and the cell integrals partition the exactly vanishing continuous theta-index integral.

rows.proof_boundary: Exact pointwise kernel identity at t=0.

rows.claim: The cell-renormalized kernels are normally summable in every polynomially weighted L1 norm.

diagnostics.first_cell: For 0<a<=1, ||g_a||_(L1_k)<=C_k*a^(-1/2)*(1+|log a|^k), which is integrable at a=0.

rows.proof_boundary: Endpoint kernel theorem; Gaussian positive-time weights are excluded.

rows.claim: The renormalized cosine transforms and all fixed derivative orders converge absolutely and uniformly.

diagnostics.mode: The series and every fixed derivative order converge absolutely and uniformly on the real spectral axis.

rows.claim: The transform counterterm is exactly Euler's convergent sum-integral continuation of zeta on the critical line.

diagnostics.scope: This is a convergent Euler cell-renormalization derived from the kernel; it uses no information about zeta zeros.

rows.proof_boundary: Reconstructs H_0 without using zero information; it is not a zero-free factorization.

rows.claim: Every renormalized block contributes positively at zero frequency.
rows.proof_boundary: One spectral point only; no global Fourier positivity follows.

rows.claim: The endpoint first Laguerre expression is an absolutely convergent infinite mixed-term matrix sum.

diagnostics.boundary: The identity retains every mixed sign; no positivity of the matrix is proved.
diagnostics.convergence: The double series is absolutely and locally uniformly convergent because the J_n jets are normally summable through order two.

rows.proof_boundary: Exact matrix representation; positivity of the matrix sum remains open.

rows.claim: Every individual cell-renormalized block retains an exponential tail that the positive Newman weight makes nonintegrable.

diagnostics.consequence: For every fixed n>=1 and every t>0, exp(t*u^2)*r_n(u) is not integrable and has no ordinary half-line Fourier transform.
diagnostics.decision: The cell-renormalized decomposition is exact at t=0 but cannot be deformed blockwise to the positive Newman times required by the strict-correlation target.

rows.proof_boundary: Rejects blockwise positive-time deformation of this renormalization only.

rows.claim: The remaining direct route needs t-compatible modular cancellation inside each coupled group.
rows.formula: Construct a t-compatible modular grouping whose individual blocks cancel the full negative-side theta tail before multiplication by exp(t*u^2), or work directly with the endpoint-subtracted theta primitive A_t and prove positivity of its coupled curvature expression.
rows.proof_boundary: Open; not strict Laguerre positivity, Wiener density, RH, or Lambda<=0.

status: exact endpoint cell renormalization with positive-time obstruction
